gaps: A statpack cut for original petitions (In Re habeas/mandamus, 25-5xxx IFP originals) — the modern discretionary-cert section excludes exactly the population this case belongs to
fedcourts query filters for fee class (paid vs IFP) and petition kind (cert vs original), so retrieved priors can match posture instead of just court+era
A provisioning-time staleness check: a forward cell whose snapshot already contains a dispositive order should be routed to outcome formation, not prediction
helpful: The provisioned snapshot (contained the dispositive docket entry)
fedcourts paths for resolving the output directory
notes: Low-retrieval cell: the snapshot already carried the final order, so MCP/REST retrieval was unnecessary. fedcourts query (court+era filters only) returned counseled cert petitions with little similarity to a pro se IFP original habeas petition.
